title: We must not store up wealth in our houses, but virtue in our souls; fo | Musonius Rufus
description:
We polish how we look to others and neglect who we actually are. What's one thing you do purely for appearances?

#stoicism #ego #musoniusrufus #stoicphilosophy #virtue #humility #selfmastery #dailystoic #mindsetshift #innerpeace
quote: We must not store up wealth in our houses, but virtue in our souls; for that is the only true ornament.
author: Musonius Rufus
